sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Reef current variants
queue.reason: Only expand reef-flow play if future work adds distinct current tools, reef goals, accessibility paths, tutorial reefs, or weather systems rather than more larva labels.

queue.title: Audio rhythm variants
queue.reason: Only expand audio-memory play if future work adds distinct rhythm notation, tutorial recipes, accessible visual-only play paths, or ensemble mechanics rather than more sound labels.

queue.title: Lock and water variants
queue.reason: Only expand lock-management play if future work adds distinct canal geometry, tutorials, accessibility paths, weather events, or cargo contracts rather than more boat labels.

queue.title: Spectrum simulation variants
queue.reason: Only expand radio-grid play if future work adds distinct terrain, weather, training levels, accessibility paths, or frequency-market rules rather than more caller labels.

queue.title: Cellular simulation variants
queue.reason: Only expand culture-growth play if future work adds distinct strain behaviors, tutorial dishes, accessibility paths, or scenario setup rather than more target labels.

queue.title: Spatial crafting variants
queue.reason: Only expand glyph crafting if future work adds distinct patron goals, pattern language, tutorials, accessibility paths, or meaningful forge events rather than more symbol labels.

queue.title: Deduction puzzle variants
queue.reason: Only expand mystery play if future work adds distinct evidence chains, tutorial cases, accessibility review paths, or non-accusation scoring rather than more suspect labels.

queue.title: Cooperative routing variants
queue.reason: Only expand two-agent path planning if future work adds distinct escort roles, asymmetric abilities, rescue events, accessibility paths, or scenario setup rather than more terrain labels.

queue.title: Structural puzzle variants
queue.reason: Only expand bridge-building play if future work adds distinct materials, tutorials, span geometries, inspection events, or accessibility paths rather than more cargo labels.

queue.title: Crowd-flow variants
queue.reason: Only expand crowd simulations if future work adds distinct venue shapes, accessibility routing, emergency events, staffing roles, or tutorial levels rather than more crowd labels.

queue.title: Ecosystem defense variants
queue.reason: Only expand lane-defense play if future work adds distinct weather systems, enemy behaviors, accessibility paths, or map objectives rather than more pest labels.

queue.title: Optics puzzle variants
queue.reason: Only expand beam-routing play if future work adds distinct mirror physics, tutorial levels, accessibility paths, or level-editor choices rather than more target labels.
